since_last: 23% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.52%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 23% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.72% · BTC -0.90% · Gold +0.24% · Nasdaq100 -1.60%. 23% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.52%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.52%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.87%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -11.06%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +4.02%, ZS +2.82%, PANW +2.59%, LEU +2.52%, OKTA +2.20%. Laggards: ISRG -11.06%, AMAT -5.63%, UPST -5.17%, PUBM -4.99%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.69% at $126.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
